mapper.sql: id, template_code, template_name, file_name, file_path, total_count, success_count, fail_count, skip_count, import_status, error_msg, start_time, end_time, create_by, create_time
mapper.insert: insert into biz_import_batch (template_code, template_name, file_name, file_path, total_count, success_count, fail_count, skip_count, import_status, error_msg, start_time, end_time, create_by, create_time) values (#{templateCode}, #{templateName}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, 0, 0, 0, 0, #{importStatus}, #{errorMsg}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{createBy}, now())
mapper.update: update biz_import_batch set total_count = #{totalCount}, success_count = #{successCount}, fail_count = #{failCount}, skip_count = #{skipCount}, import_status = #{importStatus}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, end_time = #{endTime} where id = #{id}
